description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa upholstered in a glossy, brown leather-like material. The sofa features three distinct seat sections, each with a matching back cushion, and is accompanied by three loose, square throw pillows. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy silhouette. The back of the sofa is flat and unadorned, with the same material wrapping around all visible surfaces. The seat and back cushions appear thick and plush, providing ample comfort, while the overall design is minimalist and contemporary. No visible legs are present, giving the sofa a grounded, monolithic appearance.
description: A glossy brown leather sofa with three seat sections, matching back cushions, and three loose throw pillows. It has broad, straight armrests and a boxy, modern design with no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat sections, three back cushions, and three loose throw pillows arranged across the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions, with pillows visible along the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back panel and the tops of the back cushions and pillows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest and the arrangement of cushions and pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size, with three loose square throw pillows placed along the backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and fully upholstered in the same glossy material.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa base appears solid and flush with the ground, giving a monolithic, grounded look.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with three attached or closely fitted back cushions, matching the seat sections in width.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, glossy brown leather-like upholstery with a smooth, slightly reflective finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
